purpose.mission: Establish the executive branch that implements laws, manages operations, and ensures continuity.
purpose.context: Completes the governance triad with the Senate (law-making) and Judiciary (law review).

powers_and_duties.enforce_laws: Execute Senate decisions and Judiciary rulings
powers_and_duties.execute_approvals: Finalize entries in approved_businesses.json for businesses that pass all gates
powers_and_duties.represent_pulseworld: Symbolic head for external relations per International Doctrine

checks_and_balances.judiciary_review: Courts may strike down unlawful executive actions
checks_and_balances.inspector_general: Independent audits and investigations per IG Doctrine (when enacted)

emergency_powers.renewal: Requires Senate vote to extend beyond 30 days
emergency_powers.judicial_review: Emergency actions are subject to Judiciary review

accountability.annual_report: Publish actions, expenditures, outcomes in Shared Archive
accountability.transparency: All Executive orders logged and publicly readable
